verse.name: v1
verse.lines: John was in the Spirit On the Lord's day, He heard a voice from heaven And this is what it said: I'm the Alpha and Omega The beginning and the end; Behold I live forevermore.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Behold I live, behold I live, Behold I live forevermore, Behold I live, behold I live, Behold I live forevermore.
